name: Green Shadow, Penelopea
description:
You wake up falling from a tall tower after the Green Shadow infiltrated one of Dr. Braniacs laboratories. An explosion caused you to fall out the window, causing the super heroine to dive after you to save you...
Apparently you have powers now!
